title: Bitter Beef Stir Fry
description: A simple and flavorful stir fry made with beef and vegetables, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: 1. Slice the bitter melon and beef into thin strips.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, ginger, and garlic. Add the sliced beef and marinate for at least 15 minutes.
3. Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
4. Add the beef to the skillet and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes. Remove from the skillet and set aside.
5. In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil.
6. Add the sliced bitter melon to the skillet and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
7. Return the cooked beef to the skillet and stir in the soy sauce marinade.
8. Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
9. Serve the beef and bitter melon hot, garnished with creamy sauce if desired.
